source_identity.requested_doi_title: One-Step Butadiene Synthesis via Gas-Phase Prins Condensation of Propylene with Formaldehyde over Heteropolyacid Catalysts
source_identity.matched_title: Reaction Mechanism, Origins of Enantioselectivity, and Reactivity Trends in Asymmetric Allylic Alkylation: A Comprehensive Quantum Mechanics Investigation of a C(sp3)-C(sp3) Cross-Coupling

source_objects.relation: identity check for the user-supplied DOI; unrelated article
NIH author manuscript for DOI 10.1021/jacs.0c06243; not the version of record
source_objects.claim_ceiling: article text and explicit author-manuscript locators only

source_objects.relation: CaltechAUTHORS supplemental material explicitly attached to DOI 10.1021/jacs.0c06243
source_objects.claim_ceiling: short source-located paraphrases and hash-bound factual coordinate blocks; ACS copyrighted SI is not versioned

source_objects.relation: CaltechAUTHORS quantum-mechanical-energy workbook attached to the same article record
source_objects.claim_ceiling: energy-table observations only; no wavefunction or TS validation claim

reported_identity.value: (Si/chair/ax)-TS20, one of eight seven-membered-ring reductive-elimination conformers
reported_identity.locator: article Figures 9-10; SI Tables 4-7 and S198-S200
reported_identity.ceiling: reported label and conformer identity only

total_charge.ceiling: coordinate block has no charge line

electronic_state_spin_surface.locator: article Introduction mentions Pd(0)/Pd(II) catalysis generally
electronic_state_spin_surface.ceiling: general catalytic-cycle language cannot be copied to exact TS20

stability_s2_occupation_multireference.ceiling: no candidate-bound observations or acceptance policy

nuclearity_and_inventory.value: one Pd, one PHOX ligand and bound enolate/allyl-derived organic inventory represented by C35H42NO2PPd
nuclearity_and_inventory.ceiling: element inventory and article labels only; connectivity is not proven by XYZ

coordination_geometry_denticity_hapticit.ceiling: depiction/general discussion does not close a one-based contact inventory

counterion_explicit_solvent_additive.ceiling: none is explicitly identified in the exact coordinate block

elementary_step.value: inner-sphere C-C bond formation described as reductive elimination

forming_breaking_coordinate.ceiling: no one-based atom roles or displacement vector supplied

imaginary_frequency_and_mode.ceiling: generic one-imaginary-mode statement is not a raw candidate-specific value or mode review

irc_endpoints.ceiling: no TS20 direction records or structurally identified endpoint coordinate pair

program_version.ceiling: SI gives study-wide versions but does not bind one version to TS20

optimization.locator: SI S2 and TS20 table footnotes
optimization.ceiling: reported reproduction setting, not an Auto-G16 protocol choice

frequency.ceiling: study-wide method statement; no raw TS20 frequency list

single_point_dft.value: M06/def2-TZVP with def2-ECP on Pd and CPCM(THF) for reported text energies; additional functionals tabulated
single_point_dft.locator: article Computational Methods; SI S2 and Tables 4-7

single_point_coupled_cluster.value: DLPNO-CCSD(T)/cc-pVTZ-PP[Pd]-cc-pVTZ[other], SK-MCDHF-RSC ECP on Pd, CPCM(THF), NormalPNO with selected TightPNO refinements

basis_by_element.value: Pd LANL2TZ(f) with 28-core Hay-Wadt ECP for optimization; H/C/N/O/P 6-31G(d); all-atom def2-TZVP SP with def2-ECP on Pd

relativity.ceiling: ECP identities/core sizes do not justify inferring a separate relativity model

dispersion.value: Becke-Johnson damped D3 for BP86 optimization

solvent.value: CPCM(THF) for principal single points; optimization geometries described as gas phase in TS20 table footnotes

thermochemistry.value: 298 K unscaled-frequency thermal corrections; quasi-RRHO; 1 M standard state, with CO2 exception irrelevant to TS20
thermochemistry.ceiling: study-wide convention explicitly reported but no candidate-specific correction table

ts_search_strategy.ceiling: no Hessian/QST/scan/other localization procedure bound to TS20

scf_and_grid.ceiling: study-wide numerical settings; candidate-specific SCF stability remains absent
